input.task: Create a LinkedIn post about the importance of AI in healthcare
input.plan: Discuss AI's role in diagnostics, patient care, and operational efficiency
content: AI can analyze medical data faster than humans.
AI-powered tools help in early diagnosis of diseases.
Hospitals use AI for better resource management.
input.brand_guidelines: Use a professional tone with a focus on innovation and trust.

description: Tests the tool's ability to generate a coherent and engaging post on a complex topic.

input.task: Write a LinkedIn post about remote work trends
input.plan: Highlight flexibility, productivity, and work-life balance
content: Remote work has increased by 300% since 2020.
Employees report higher job satisfaction.
Companies save on office space costs.
input.brand_guidelines: Maintain a casual yet informative tone, emphasizing employee well-being.

description: Evaluates the tool's accuracy in reflecting current remote work trends.

input.task: Generate a LinkedIn post about sustainable business practices
input.plan: Discuss eco-friendly initiatives and their impact on brand reputation
content: Sustainability is a key driver for modern businesses.
Eco-friendly practices attract environmentally conscious consumers.
Sustainable brands see a 20% increase in customer loyalty.
input.brand_guidelines: Use a persuasive tone with a focus on environmental responsibility.

description: Assesses the tool's ability to create a persuasive post that aligns with brand values.

input.task: Create a LinkedIn post about the future of electric vehicles
input.plan: Focus on technological advancements and market growth
content: Electric vehicle sales are projected to increase by 30% annually.
New battery technologies extend vehicle range.
Governments offer incentives for electric vehicle adoption.
input.brand_guidelines: Adopt an optimistic and forward-thinking tone.

description: Tests the tool's capability to handle complex topics with multiple key points.

input.task: Write a LinkedIn post about the benefits of mindfulness in the workplace
input.plan: Explain how mindfulness improves focus and reduces stress
content: Mindfulness practices can increase productivity by 15%.
Employees report lower stress levels with regular mindfulness sessions.
Mindfulness fosters a positive work environment.
input.brand_guidelines: Use a calming and supportive tone, focusing on employee well-being.

description: Evaluates the tool's ability to create a supportive and informative post.

input.task: Generate a LinkedIn post about cybersecurity best practices
input.plan: Highlight the importance of data protection and employee training
content: Cyber threats are becoming more sophisticated.
Regular training can prevent 80% of cyber attacks.
Data protection is crucial for maintaining customer trust.
input.brand_guidelines: Maintain a serious and authoritative tone, emphasizing security.

description: Tests the tool's accuracy in conveying critical cybersecurity information.

input.task: Create a LinkedIn post about the impact of digital transformation
input.plan: Discuss how digital tools enhance business operations and customer experience
content: Digital tools streamline operations and improve efficiency.
Enhanced customer experience leads to higher satisfaction.
Digital transformation is essential for staying competitive.
input.brand_guidelines: Use a dynamic and innovative tone, focusing on growth.

description: Assesses the tool's ability to generate a post that highlights digital transformation benefits.

input.task: Write a LinkedIn post about leadership in the digital age
input.plan: Focus on adaptability, communication, and technology adoption
content: Leaders must adapt to rapidly changing technologies.
Effective communication is key in digital leadership.
Technology adoption drives organizational success.
input.brand_guidelines: Adopt an inspirational and motivational tone.

description: Tests the tool's ability to create an inspirational post on a multifaceted topic.

input.task: Generate a LinkedIn post about the role of AI in education
input.plan: Discuss personalized learning and AI-driven educational tools
content: AI enables personalized learning experiences.
AI tools help educators identify student needs.
AI-driven platforms enhance student engagement.
input.brand_guidelines: Use an educational and informative tone, focusing on innovation.

description: Assesses the tool's ability to generate an informative post on AI in education.

input.task: Write a LinkedIn post about the benefits of diversity in the workplace
input.plan: Highlight innovation, creativity, and improved decision-making
content: Diverse teams drive innovation and creativity.
Companies with diverse leadership perform better financially.
Diversity leads to improved decision-making processes.
input.brand_guidelines: Use an inclusive and empowering tone, emphasizing diversity.
